title: abies pinsapo subsp. pinsapo
intro: Abies pinsapo subsp. pinsapo, also known as Spanish fir, is a coniferous evergreen tree species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The essential oil extracted from the tree's needles has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The herbal preparations of Abies pinsapo subsp. pinsapo include essential oil, resin, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall health and well-being.
